name: model rationale detector rejects a model_rationale that is shorter than the minimum-length threshold
command:
mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x
model: sonnet
model_rationale: nope
' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompt prompts/x/v1.0.0.md --min-length 20 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rationale_too_short' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
